name: Traditional 4 Drawer Dresser Classic White - Room Essentials™
description:
Give your bedroom a stylish storage upgrade with this 4-Drawer Dresser from Room Essentials™. This wooden dresser features a sleek design for a clean, modern look, and the white color pairs easily with a variety of decor styles. The four spacious drawers with metal knobs provide ample storage space for clothing, accessories and more, while the flat top offers space to display a lamp, frame or other small decorative items.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value

Detailed Dimensions:
Overall Width: 31.97 inches
Overall Height: 37.95 inches
Overall Depth: 20 inches
Distance from floor to bottom: 3.35 inches
Distance between front legs: 28.35 inches
Distance between front leg and back leg: 16.34 inches
Depth of drawer: 13.88 inches
Width of drawer front: 28.11 inches
Height of drawer front: 7.62 inches
Depth of drawer: 9.57 inches
Height of drawer: 5.28 inches
Width of drawer: 26.42 inches
